messages.content:
Generate 3 short, friendly, situational one-liners about: AgentsMdGapDetected in a software project.
Real state: tasks:0 stuck:0, traj:0, mem:0, mcp:0 failing:0, providers_ok:true. Keep each under 80 chars. No jargon. No fake events.
Output as a JSON array of 3 strings.

```json
[
  "No tasks or stuck agents detected - everything looks good!",
  "All systems go, no agents stuck or failing",
  "Smooth sailing, no stuck or failing agents detected"
]
```
